title: 'Don't put cart before horse': Court rejects Lalu's plea seeking unrelied documents for trial
summary: Special Judge Vishal Gogne underlined that providing these documents en bloc would not only "place the cart before the horse" but also throw the judicial process into "complete disarray".

title: Delhi wakes up to cloudy weather with light rain, minimum temperature at 17.6°C
summary: The IMD stated that Safdarjung and Lodhi Road recorded 8.2 mm of rainfall each, while the Ridge station received 8.6 mm and Palam recorded 6.2 mm.

title: 1,000 Indians still in Iran; 23,000 students in Gulf could not appear in CBSE exams: External Affairs Ministry
summary: This Ministry conveyed this to the Parliamentary Standing Committee on External Affairs; “We got some answers. We didn’t get all. The Foreign Secretary was not available,” Shashi Tharoor, chairman of the panel, said

title: UDF to announce candidates for all 140 Kerala Assembly seats today, says V.D. Satheesan
summary: Speaking at Kochi airport on his return from Delhi, Satheesan says the party has already cleared 95 names, which will also be released later in the day
